@Activities:	1-3 marked as gems within the transcript: 1 = "warm-up": revision of familiar material - months of the year , 2 = "water interview"; 3= "rat search" .

@Activities:	1-3 marked as gems within the transcript: 1 = "warm-up": revision of familiar material - months of the year , 2 = revision of familiar words 3= reading from a picture book

@Activities:	1-3 marked as gems within the transcript: 1 = "warm-up": revision of familiar material - Pohadka o řepě (A Story about a Turnip) , 2 = "water interview " - asymmetrical speaker roles: i.e.answers to questions about the element water and freeexpression; 3= "rat search" - interactive free expression, symmetrical speaker roles between L1 and L2 with occasional stimulus from the interviewers: testing problem solving abilities, simple conversational/ pragmatic competence.
